title: Crosshair centered on band scale bar series

in_scope: CodePen: stacked bar crosshair centering (matches #1764 user scenario)
Repo example: examples/crosshair-band-center/ (SVG simple bars + crosshair)
Repo example: examples/crosshair-band-center-stacked/ (SVG stacked bars + crosshair)
Repo example: examples/crosshair-band-center-webgl/ (WebGL bars + SVG crosshair overlay)
Code comments documenting why WebGL crosshairs use SVG overlay pattern
Upstream comment on d3fc/d3fc#1764 with CodePen
out_of_scope: Changes to d3fc source code (xyBase.js, crosshair.js)
WebGL-native crosshair implementation (not needed — SVG overlay is the correct pattern)
Canvas crosshair variant (same .x() accessor pattern, SVG examples sufficient)

acceptance_criteria: Crosshair vertical line centers on bar (not left edge) for all three examples
CodePen demonstrates stacked bar centering matching #1764 scenario
WebGL example uses SVG overlay pattern with chartCartesian multi-plot-area
Code comments in WebGL example explain why crosshairs are SVG overlays by design
All examples follow d3fc conventions (30 bars, bandwidth 10, seedrandom, mockdate)

repo_examples.description: SVG simple bars + centered crosshair on scaleBand
SVG stacked bars + centered crosshair on scaleBand
WebGL bars + SVG crosshair overlay, documenting overlay pattern
